zh.lifeSummary: 當Willem II van Egmond於大約1221年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德時，他的父親Gerard I Lord of Egmond22歲，母親Beatrix van Haarlem17歲。他於大約1250年與Ada van Brederode在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德被列為heer。他去世於1304年3月20日在他的家鄉享年84歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Willem II van Egmond于大约1221年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德时，他的父亲Gerard I Lord of Egmond22岁，母亲Beatrix van Haarlem17岁。他于大约1250年与Ada van Brederode在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德被列为heer。他去世于1304年3月20日在他的家乡享年84岁，埋葬在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Egmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Esmond (Old English Ēastmund, ēast ‘grace, beauty’ + mund ‘protection’). A Norman French cognate, of ancient Germanic origin, is also found. See also Eastman .

variants.name: Eastman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Estmund (Old English Ēastmund, from ēast ‘east’ + mund ‘protection’). See also Esmond .
English: occasionally a variant of Heasman, a topographic name for a dweller ‘(in the) brushwood’, from Old English hǣse ‘brushwood’ + mann (compare Hayes 3).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Swedish Östman (see Ostman ) and North German Ostmann or Östmann (see Oestmann ).

nameMeanings.name: Willem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Willem II van Egmond was born about 1221, in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Gerard I Lord of Egmond, was 22 and his mother, Beatrix van Haarlem, was 17. He married Ada van Brederode about 1250, in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as heer in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands. He died on 20 March 1304, in his hometown, at the age of 84, and was buried in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Willem II van Egmond est né environ 1221, à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Gerard I Lord of Egmond, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Beatrix van Haarlem, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Ada van Brederode environ 1250, à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est heer à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1304, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Willem II van Egmond um 1221 in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard I Lord of Egmond 22 und seine Mutter Beatrix van Haarlem 17. Er hat um 1250 in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande Ada van Brederode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als heer in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. März 1304 im Alter von 84 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Willem II van Egmond è nato il circa 1221 nel Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Gerard I Lord of Egmond, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix van Haarlem, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Ada van Brederode circa 1250, nel Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come heer nel Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì il 20 marzo 1304, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Willem II van Egmondが約1221年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドで生まれた時，父Gerard I Lord of Egmondは22歳，母Beatrix van Haarlemは17歳であった。約1250年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドでAda van Brederodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドでの職業はheerと記録されている。彼は1304年3月20日に故郷で84歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, North Holla: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.lifeSummary: Willem II van Egmond(이)가 대략 1221년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard I Lord of Egmond(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix van Haarlem(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 Ada van Brederode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 heer이었다. 그는 1304년 3월 20일 그의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Willem II van Egmond nasceu aproximadamente 1221, em Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gerard I Lord of Egmond, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix van Haarlem, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada van Brederode aproximadamente 1250, em Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como heer em Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1304, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, North Holla: эгмонд аан ден хоеф, биржен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Willem II van Egmond родился около 1221 г. в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Gerard I Lord of Egmond было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix van Haarlem, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada van Brederode около 1250 г. в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии heer в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер 20 марта 1304 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Willem II van Egmond nació aproximadamente 1221, en Egmond, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Gerard I Lord of Egmond, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Beatrix van Haarlem, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Ada van Brederode aproximadamente 1250, en Egmond, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era heer en Egmond, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1304, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Egmond, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos.
